subject: WM-0004 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Prior High fixed: packaged Electron ignores WM_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER_URL via app.isPackaged guard and packaged smoke asserts file:/// while dev URL is set. Prior Medium fixed: build cleans dist/main and packager copies only dist/main/main.js; post-smoke artifact contains no desktop-shell.e2e.test.js. Required checks and targeted e2e passed.
